source_description: Foundation still carries parallel compatibility paths around Symfony Routing and HttpFoundation shapes (e.g. HttpKernel catches Symfony routing exceptions; ControllerDispatcher normalizes [Class, method] array controllers; HttpKernelServiceResolver duplicates DatabaseInterface resolution already exposed via KernelServicesInterface). Mission #824 typed KernelServices and HttpServiceResolver seams explicitly to shrink implicit fallbacks — this mission completes that trajectory by inventorying remaining fallbacks, choosing elimination vs documented retention per item, and wiring everything through explicit contracts so no duplicate or Symfony-shaped shadow paths remain in foundation HTTP/bootstrap.
